Blackberry's grow all along the greenway that runs through shelby bottoms.  They start to ripen in mid June and produce through the summer and into Autumn. Falling Fruit season: June-August.
Alongside paved path connecting Cornelia Fort Airpark to the rest of the greenway system. Very plentiful. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-August.

Go in the alley way between S 12th and S 13th Street. Behind 710 S 13th (yellow house) there is a GIANT pecan tree that produces massive amounts of Pecans around October-November. You can access all you need from the alley way. Access: Private but overhanging.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
The tree is mine and is growing right next to the sidewalk where it drops abundant fruit over several weeks in the fall. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: September-October.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
